name: Peanut Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat shortening and sugars until creamy.
2. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt together.
3. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the creamed mixture; blend well.
4. Stir in peanuts and oats.
5. Drop heaping teaspoonfuls of batter onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (375°F) for 12 to 15 minutes.
